title: Outdoor Sectional Ottoman / Accent Table
summary: A low slatted-top 2x4 table sized to match a modern outdoor sectional — works as an ottoman with a cushion or a bare-wood accent table, built from three boards and one afternoon's worth of screws.
description:
This is a genuinely simple build: a rectangular 2x4 seat frame, four legs screwed in at a slight inward angle to kill wobble, and evenly spaced 2x4 slats across the top. **Screwing the legs at a slight angle rather than straight in is the one real technique here** — it does more to steady the finished piece than any amount of extra hardware would.

Lay out the tabletop slats with even gaps before driving any screws, and consider marking out the screw hole locations first for a neater, more consistent finished look. 2x2 trim caps both the ends of the tabletop slats and the tops of the legs, finishing the piece whether you top it with a cushion as an ottoman or leave it bare as an accent table.

materials.name: Exterior penetrating wood stain or paint

steps.title: Cut all the parts
steps.body: Cut two seat frame, long at 22", two seat frame, short at 19", four legs at 13-1/2" and six tabletop boards at 22" from the 2x4, 8 ft, cedar or outdoor rated. Cut two end trim at 25" from the 2x2. Allowing about 1/8" for each saw cut, that comes to three 8 ft 2x4, 8 ft, cedar or outdoor rated. Square every cut and label each piece as it comes off the saw.

steps.title: Build the seat frame
steps.body: Attach the seat frame boards together with 2-1/2" screws, two per joint.

steps.title: Attach the legs
steps.body: Attach the legs with 2-1/2" screws, two per joint, driven from inside the seat frame into the back of the legs at a slight angle to prevent wobble.

steps.title: Attach the tabletop
steps.body: Lay out the tabletop slat boards with even spacing and screw down.

steps.title: Add the trim
steps.body: Attach the 2x2 trim to the ends of the tabletop slats and to the tops of the legs.

steps.title: Finish
materials: Exterior penetrating wood stain or paint

images.alt: Outdoor sectional ottoman and accent table
